programs.title: ER
programs.desc: During the graveyard shift, Pratt treats a man who has lost the power of speech and a boy who has swallowed a quarter. Elsewhere, Abby has a frosty meeting with her ex-husband, while Elizabeth starts warming up to Dr. Dorset.

programs.title: My Family
programs.desc: Ben is rushed to hospital after turning white and is forced to reveal that he took Viagra. Placed on a low-carb diet, he turns to Brigitte's guru for help. Meanwhile, Susan's yoga teacher has fallen out with her husband.

programs.title: Rage Vault
programs.desc: From Bon Jovi to Iron Maiden, Poison, David Lee Roth, Siouxsie and The Banshees and more, rage dives into the Vault to bring you the best rock and metal clips from 1986.

programs.title: QI
programs.desc: Quiz show in which contestants are rewarded more if their answers are 'quite interesting'. Host Stephen Fry endearingly embodies 'Empire' with Bill Bailey, Jo Brand, Sean Lock and Alan Davies.

programs.title: QI
programs.desc: Stephen Fry goes decidedly kitsch with Sue Perkins, Reginald D Hunter and Jimmy Carr.

programs.title: The Outlaws
programs.desc: A few months on, the outlaws still have time to serve on their sentences. But they discover the criminal underworld isn't done with them yet. Thrown out by her parents, Rani pitches up at Christian's.
